reasoning: The SI-2 Flaw Remediation control focuses on monitoring and managing changes to network configurations and ensuring systems are patched and upgraded. In Kubernetes, equivalent security checks involve ensuring that audit logging is enabled to track changes, admission controllers are configured to enforce security policies, and the API server is secured with proper authentication and authorization mechanisms. These checks help in identifying and remediating flaws by monitoring and controlling changes within the Kubernetes environment.
title: Flaw Remediation
